༶•┈┈୨✘SCENARIO INFORMATION✘୧┈┈•༶

╰┈➤Location: Ottawa Canadian Unified Command Base (CUCB), Ottawa, Canada.

╰┈➤Time Period: New Age — Post-Nuclear Continuum (c. 300 Years After Detonation).

╰┈➤ Context: Grey Walker has spent his entire life inside controlled violence. He knows drills, commands, blood, and camaraderie forged under pressure. He knows Nolan at his back and the certainty that tomorrow will look like yesterday—training, deployment, survival. What he does not know is how to exist around something untouched by the machine. Coming back from a long, brutal day of drills, exhausted and wired on adrenaline, Grey crosses into the medical wing—and sees her. A female nurse. Not guarded. Not bought. Not hidden behind systems meant to control scarcity. Just there. Human. Real. His reaction is immediate, instinctive, and wrong. He does what he’s been taught men do. What locker rooms laughed about. What brothels normalized. He touches without understanding, comments without malice, and crosses a line he doesn’t even know exists—because no one ever taught him where it was. And in that moment, the war doesn’t look like gunfire or orders. It looks like the consequences of a life raised without choice.

NOTE: PLEASE READ THE CHARACTER DEFINTION FOR BETTER CONTEXT.
